title: Epic Games presents Unreal Engine 6 and 5.8 integrating generative AI and the Fortnite ecosystem
summary: The new version of the graphics engine will allow using Fortnite skins in other games, includes Lumen Lite for Switch 2 and generative AI tools.

title: Grand Theft Auto V updates free to PS5 and Xbox Series X|S version on June 18
summary: Owners of GTA V on previous generation consoles will be able to get the enhanced version at no additional cost.

title: British court allows former Rockstar employees to sue over alleged union blacklist
summary: The employment tribunal rejected Rockstar's request to dismiss allegations of retaliation against workers who reported anti-union practices.

title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day trailer reveals Hulk and a new suit for Marvel's Spider-Man 2
summary: The film shows mutations that will change the MCU and the video game incorporates the suit inspired by the movie.

title: Call of Duty: Black Ops and Black Ops II to receive ports for PlayStation 4 and PlayStation 5
summary: Activision and Treyarch will release updated versions of the two classics of the franchise, highly anticipated by fans.

title: Dave the Diver receives the Into the Jungle expansion with new content and a short film
summary: The update adds fish, recipes, and a live-action short produced by the Sharknado studio.

title: The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales arrives on Switch 2 to positive reviews
summary: The space adventure game has been well received by the press, which highlights its emotional story and polished gameplay.

title: The new game from Yakuza creator, Gang of Dragon, appears canceled after losing funding
summary: Reports indicate that NetEase withdrew support and the director left the project, leaving it in limbo.

title: Dispatch removes some censorship on Switch and Switch 2 with the 'HR Violations' update
summary: The patch allows unlocking previously censored content, including the protagonist's signature dance.

title: Shawn Layden, former PlayStation boss, criticizes Xbox strategies for their misunderstanding of the industry
summary: The executive considers that Microsoft's recent moves demonstrate a lack of understanding of the interactive entertainment business.

title: Vampire Survivors reconsiders its collaboration with Fortnite following Epic's generative AI policies
summary: The studio evaluates withdrawing from the crossover due to the controversy surrounding the use of generative AI in games.

title: Microsoft reportedly planned to close Ninja Theory before announcing its new project
summary: The company allegedly planned the closure of the studio while promoting the team's next game, which has generated criticism.

title: Kwalee closes its studio and lays off the entire Luna Abyss development team
summary: The British studio shuts down after the launch of its bullet hell, victim of the saturated release calendar.

title: Stop Killing Games initiative suffers setback in European Parliament but continues
summary: The movement to prevent the shutdown of multiplayer game servers did not achieve a legal victory but continues its struggle.

title: Assassin's Creed Shadows receives its final update with a new arc that connects to Black Flag Resynced
summary: The additional content closes the story and prepares the ground for the next installment of the saga.

title: Granblue Fantasy: Relink - Endless Ragnarok demo now available on Nintendo Switch 2
summary: Players can try the new expansion of the action RPG, which according to first impressions adapts very well to the console.

title: Street Fighter 6 adds Yasmine as a new DLC character in August
summary: The fighter will be shown with a gameplay trailer before her release on August 3.

title: A paid app allows using DualSense wireless features on PC
summary: Players can enjoy haptic feedback and adaptive triggers without needing a cable.

title: Official PS5 SSDs reach prices higher than the console itself
summary: The SanDisk units licensed for PlayStation 5 cost more than a PS5 Pro, generating criticism among users.

title: Warframe continues its emotional story with the Jade Shadows: Constellations mission
summary: The update adds mods, items, and an unexpected continuation of the plot that the developers consider surprising.
